title: Asia stock markets slump and oil rises on fears Iran war may drag on
description: The conflict in the Middle East has rattled financial markets and global energy prices have soared.
content:
Asian stock markets fell for a third day on Wednesday and oil prices rose on fears the US-Israel war with Iran may drag on, causing an energy shock which could fuel inflation

title: TikTok says it won't encrypt DMs claiming it puts users at risk
description: TikTok tells the BBC it won't join rival platforms such as WhatsApp and Messenger in using end-to-end encryption.
content:
TikTok will not introduce end-to-end encryption (E2EE) - the controversial privacy feature used by nearly all its rivals - arguing it makes users less safe.
E2EE means only the sender and recipient of a direct message can view its contents, making it... [2058 chars]

title: Flagship Harry Potter store to open on London’s Oxford Street
description: British outlet for the Hogwarts-adjacent ‘interactive retail experience’ will include recreated film locations, as well as ‘photo moments’ and merch
content:
Warner Bros has announced it is to open a 21,000 sq ft Harry Potter store on Oxford Street, one of London’s busiest retail thoroughfares.
